etymology.description: Variant form of ÕŠĘ(ÕŠĘ) (d├®, "virtue") -> retains similar phonetic and semantic attributes
etymology.interpretation: Ńźü is a less commonly used form that corresponds to ÕŠĘ(ÕŠĘ) (d├®, "virtue"). While the character itself doesn't appear to have separate etymological components, it is directly tied to the same meaning and function as ÕŠĘ.
